analysis.technical_note: BTC holding $75K area. Recovering from $60K Feb 5 crash. ETF inflows providing floor. Key resistance ~$76-77K. Support at $73-74K. Fear & Greed 26 (Fear).
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral: Price recovering from Feb crash with strong ETF support (~$1B weekly inflows). However, Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear), geopolitical risks (US-Iran), and market still 45% below Oct 2025 ATH prevent bullish call. Confidence 0.45 = below 0.50 bot threshold - macro filter INACTIVE this cycle.
